features: Hair Treatment with Moroccan Argan Oil Extract
Argan Oil Intensive Treatment Shots are specially formulated with Argan Oil to aide in the rescue and repair of damaged hair.
The intensive formula provides strength to your damaged hair leaving hair soft, supple and easy to style.
description: Argan Oil Intensive Treatment shots have been specially made using Argan Oil to aid in rescuing and repairing damaged hair. The intensive formula provides strength to your hair leaving hair feeling soft, smooth and easy to style.
